amendment.description: To prohibit the use of funds to provide payments to certain individuals.

action.text: Amendment SA 5632 ruled out of order by the chair.
Motion to waive all budgetary discipline with respect to amendment SA 5632, not having achieved 60 votes in the affirmative, rejected in Senate by Yea-Nay Vote. 53 - 46. Record Vote Number: 161.
Point of order that the amendment violates section 313(b)(1)(a) of the CBA raised in Senate with respect to amendment SA 5632.
Amendment SA 5632 proposed by Senator Van Hollen to Amendment SA 5453. To prohibit the use of funds to provide payments to certain individuals.

Roll call votes on amendments in Senate: Motion to waive all budgetary discipline with respect to amendment SA 5632, not having achieved 60 votes in the affirmative, rejected in Senate by Yea-Nay Vote. 53 - 46. Record Vote Number: 161.
Senate amendment proposed (on the floor): Amendment SA 5632 proposed by Senator Van Hollen to Amendment SA 5453.
